name: Pancake Waffle
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp light unsulphured molasses (or bee vomit)
1 cup low fat soy milk (I use Edensoy vanilla, which is about 18% fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the dry ingredients: whole wheat flour and baking powder.
2. In a separate bowl or measuring cup, combine the wet ingredients: apple sauce, molasses, soy milk, and apple juice.
3. Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture and stir until just combined (no lumps).
4. Grease your waffle iron with cooking spray.
5. Cook the batter in the waffle iron according to the manufacturer's instructions.
6. Serve hot with fresh fruit and real maple syrup, if desired.
